metadata.description: Opinionated, privacy-first Claude Code defaults: read-only floor plus per-repo opt-in for autonomous work, with deterministic PreToolUse guardrails.

plugins.name: sane-claude-setup
plugins.description: Ships /sane-global, /sane-repo, and six always-on PreToolUse hooks (shell-exec escapes, destructive git, curl|sh, rm -rf catastrophic, sudo, gh api writes).
